thresholdSource: Endocrine marker; thyroid storm is diagnosed clinically, not by a specific free T3 cutoff — no citable acute critical value. plausibleHigh 25: above a documented survivor with free T3 >20.00 pg/mL (with free T4 >8.00 ng/dL, TSH <0.01 uIU/mL) during thyroid-storm-induced dilated cardiomyopathy, who improved dramatically and was extubated at 48 hours (PMC6726417). Accuracy bound only. Draft — not clinician-approved.
